posts.title: Why I'm Starting This Journal
posts.excerpt: A few thoughts on making space for reflection every weekend.
posts.content:
I wanted a place to put my thoughts and feelings without any pressure. Just a quiet corner where I can show up every weekend and write what’s on my mind.

It doesn’t have to be long or profound. Some weeks it might be a single idea. Other weeks it might be a ramble. The point is to show up, be honest, and give myself a record of how I was feeling over time.

Here’s to the first of many weekends.
